title: Feekoon Magnetic Stirrer 3000rpm, Magnetic Stir Plate with 5 Stir Bar and 1 Stir Bar Retriever, Max Stirring Capacity 3000ml Water Vortex Magnetic Mixer for Lab Brewing (No Heating)
description:
Complete Magnetic Stirring Kit: Package includes 1 x magnetic stirrer, 5 x different sized stirring bars, 1 x stir bar retriever, and 1 x power plug; Everything you need for precise and effective stirring
Powerful Motor & Efficient Mixing: Our magnetic stirrer features a powerful motor that reaches speeds up to 3000rpm and stirs up to 3000mL, ensuring efficient mixing for your lab needs
Compact and Portable: Designed for easy mobility, this magnetic stirrer is lightweight and portable; The corrosion resistant plastic surface is also easy to clean
Simple to Use: 1. Place the stirring bar in the solution container; 2. Position the container on the stirrer's work surface; 3. Turn on the stirrer and adjust the speed for uniform mixing; 4. Use the stir bar retriever to suck out the stir bar
Wide Range of Applications: Our magnetic stirrer is suitable for various fields: Chemical Experiments solution mixing and reaction acceleration; Biological Research media stirring and sample mixing; Pharmaceutical development dissolving drugs and controlling reactions; Food Industry sample preparation and ingredient blending
reviews_5s:
I use this to mix up my preworkout and field of greens. Works well for drink mixes. Make sure to fill the glass with water and turn on the spinning magnet, then add your powder, otherwise it gets stopped up.It does what it's supposed to. I have a more expensive heated mixer as well, and this one makes less noise. If you're mixing powder plant nutrients, I'm 100% sure this is the budget friendly one you're looking for.Performs greatThis magnetic stir plate has really helped with my mushroom cultivation. I maintain my own liquid cultures and so when not in refrigeration; they need to be stirred regularly. I have a hot-plate stirrer but it will not get up to sufficient speed to really mix floaters on the culture top down into the culture itself. This little magnetic stirrer, however, easily handles this task and, in fact, I need to watch how far I turn it so as not to fragment the liquid culture and stress it. This product also can run for long periods of time without problem. I have had this running for several weeks solid now, swapping out cultures daily. Great product!Play Video
This is my 3rd attempt at "off-brand" magnetic stirrers, and although the others functioned adequately, this one out performs the others. There are no novelties with this stirrer... No 3 random heating levels, no usb power port, just pure functionality!

That seems to be the theme to this stirrer. It has these black and red arrows to help center the flask/beaker. The control knob has a noticeable extrusion to help indicate the power applied to the stirring.

All of this is great, but the problems I've face is getting over 800mL of solution free spinning and mixing at a rapid pace. I got 3 bars ready to see what is needed to pull the surface down with just distilled water, the medium bar included, the large bar included, and my BEAST bar that would be a failsafe. It only took about 75% power with the medium bar to meet the bar!

I'm extremely satisfied with this magnetic stir bar. I'm waiting to put my fume hood together before I pick back up, but I'm genuinely happy with the test performance of this magnetic stirrer!
reviews_1s: This is just a piece of plastic. It dies not work. Would like a regund and return.
